args.query: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c IN ('Owner Assignment', 'Case Closed');

exec_args.sql: SELECT id, caseid__c, oldvalue__c, newvalue__c, createddate, field__c FROM casehistory__c WHERE field__c IN ('Owner Assignment', 'Case Closed');

args.query:
WITH owner_counts AS (
 SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment') AS owner_assign_count
 FROM casehistory__c
 GROUP BY caseid__c
),
single_owner AS (
 SELECT ch.caseid__c, ch.newvalue__c AS ownerid
 FROM casehistory__c ch
 JOIN owner_counts oc ON ch.caseid__c = oc.caseid__c
 WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND oc.owner_assign_count = 1
),
closed_cases AS (
 SELECT id, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
 FROM "Case"
 WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
   AND closeddate::date >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate::date <= '2023-09-02'
),
eligible_cases AS (
 SELECT sc.caseid__c AS caseid, sc.ownerid AS ownerid, cc.created_ts, cc.closed_ts,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cc.closed_ts - cc.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
 FROM single_owner sc
 JOIN closed_cases cc ON cc.id = sc.caseid__c
),
processed_counts AS (
 SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS ownerid, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS processed_count
 FROM casehistory__c ch
 WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment'
   AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
   AND ch.newvalue__c != 'None'
   AND ch.createddate::date >= '2023-05-02' AND ch.createddate::date <= '2023-09-02'
 GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
)
SELECT e.ownerid
FROM (
 SELECT ownerid, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds, COUNT(*) as cases_count
 FROM eligible_cases
 GROUP BY ownerid
) e
JOIN processed_counts p ON p.ownerid = e.ownerid
WHERE p.processed_count > 1
ORDER BY e.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH owner_counts AS (
 SELECT caseid__c, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE field__c='Owner Assignment') AS owner_assign_count
 FROM casehistory__c
 GROUP BY caseid__c
),
single_owner AS (
 SELECT ch.caseid__c, ch.newvalue__c AS ownerid
 FROM casehistory__c ch
 JOIN owner_counts oc ON ch.caseid__c = oc.caseid__c
 WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment' AND oc.owner_assign_count = 1
),
closed_cases AS (
 SELECT id, createddate::timestamp AS created_ts, closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
 FROM "Case"
 WHERE closeddate IS NOT NULL
   AND closeddate::date >= '2023-05-02' AND closeddate::date <= '2023-09-02'
),
eligible_cases AS (
 SELECT sc.caseid__c AS caseid, sc.ownerid AS ownerid, cc.created_ts, cc.closed_ts,
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (cc.closed_ts - cc.created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
 FROM single_owner sc
 JOIN closed_cases cc ON cc.id = sc.caseid__c
),
processed_counts AS (
 SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS ownerid, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.caseid__c) AS processed_count
 FROM casehistory__c ch
 WHERE ch.field__c='Owner Assignment'
   AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
   AND ch.newvalue__c != 'None'
   AND ch.createddate::date >= '2023-05-02' AND ch.createddate::date <= '2023-09-02'
 GROUP BY ch.newvalue__c
)
SELECT e.ownerid
FROM (
 SELECT ownerid, AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds, COUNT(*) as cases_count
 FROM eligible_cases
 GROUP BY ownerid
) e
JOIN processed_counts p ON p.ownerid = e.ownerid
WHERE p.processed_count > 1
ORDER BY e.avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
